# Hilum UI

> Hilum UI is a React design system and component catalog published at https://ui.hilum.dev. The docs site ships prerendered HTML and machine-readable indexes for AI systems and developers.

## Key Facts

- Package name: `@hilum/ui`
- Package version: 3.3.0
- Component modules: 85
- Atom components: 63
- Molecule components: 22
- Docs site: https://ui.hilum.dev
- GitHub repository: https://github.com/hilum-labs/hilum-ui
- Machine-readable docs index: https://ui.hilum.dev/catalog.json
- Machine-readable marketing blocks registry: https://ui.hilum.dev/registry.json
- Stack: React 19, Tailwind CSS v4, Radix UI primitives, TanStack Start, TanStack Router

## Installation

```bash
pnpm add @hilum/ui
# or: npm install @hilum/ui
```

Peer dependencies: `react@^19`, `react-dom@^19`, `tailwindcss@^4`

## Setup

```css
@import "tailwindcss";
@import "@hilum/ui/tokens.css";
@import "@hilum/ui/fonts.css";
```

## Theming

Hilum UI supports per-product theming with generated OKLCH palettes.

```tsx
import { ThemeProvider } from "@hilum/ui/create-theme"

export function App() {
  return (
    <ThemeProvider primary="#0066FF" secondary="#FF9900">
      <Router />
    </ThemeProvider>
  )
}
```

Primary exports:
- `createTheme({ primary, secondary })` returns `{ css, palette }`
- `applyTheme({ primary, secondary })` injects theme CSS in the browser
- `<ThemeProvider primary secondary>` applies theme CSS from React

## Documentation

- Overview: https://ui.hilum.dev/
- Foundations: https://ui.hilum.dev/foundations
- Theming: https://ui.hilum.dev/theming
- Atoms: https://ui.hilum.dev/atoms
- Molecules: https://ui.hilum.dev/molecules
- Blocks: https://ui.hilum.dev/blocks
- Marketing: https://ui.hilum.dev/marketing
- Ecommerce: https://ui.hilum.dev/ecommerce
- Application UI: https://ui.hilum.dev/application-ui
- Designer: https://ui.hilum.dev/designer

## Component Index

- Account Menu (/molecules/account-menu/) — Structured account dropdown with profile header, sections, action rows, and separators. Composes: Dropdown Menu · Avatar.
- Accordion (/atoms/accordion/) — Vertically stacked sections that expand and collapse.
- Action Panel (/molecules/action-panel/) — Bordered panel that communicates one focused action. Composes: Button · Card.
- Activity Feed (/molecules/activity-feed/) — Vertical timeline of events with icons, rich content, and timestamps. Composes: Icon.
- Alert Dialog (/atoms/alert-dialog/) — Confirmation modal that requires explicit action before proceeding.
- Alert (/atoms/alert/) — Inline message communicating status or feedback.
- Aspect Ratio (/atoms/aspect-ratio/) — Constrains content to a specific width-to-height ratio.
- Avatar Stack (/atoms/avatar-stack/) — Overlapping group of avatars with optional overflow badge.
- Avatar (/atoms/avatar/) — User representations with image, fallback, and optional status indicator.
- Badge (/atoms/badge/) — Compact labels for status, categories, and metadata.
- Breadcrumb (/atoms/breadcrumb/) — Navigation trail showing the current page location.
- Button Group (/atoms/button-group/) — Multiple related actions presented as a unified joined control.
- Button (/atoms/button/) — Triggers actions. Supports multiple variants, sizes, loading states, and icon compositions.
- Calendar (/atoms/calendar/) — Date selection calendar with single, range, and multi-select modes.
- Callout (/atoms/callout/) — Prominent status or guidance panel with icon, actions, and semantic tone.
- Card Heading (/molecules/card-heading/) — Header row for cards and panels with title, description, leading slot, and actions. Composes: Card · Avatar · Button · Dropdown Menu.
- Card (/atoms/card/) — Contained surface for grouping related content, media, stats, and article layouts.
- Carousel (/atoms/carousel/) — Horizontally scrollable item sequence with previous and next controls.
- Chart (/atoms/chart/) — Recharts-based data visualization with design-system styling.
- Checkbox (/atoms/checkbox/) — Binary selection control with checked, unchecked, and indeterminate states.
- Collapsible (/atoms/collapsible/) — Toggleable content region, often used for navigation groups.
- Color Input (/atoms/color-input/) — Compact color input combining swatch, hex field, and optional opacity control.
- Color Picker (/atoms/color-picker/) — Popover color selector with native color wheel, hex input, and preset palette.
- Combobox (/atoms/combobox/) — Searchable select field with autocomplete filtering.
- Command Palette (/molecules/command-palette/) — Modal search dialog for navigating and executing grouped commands. Composes: Dialog · Input · Icon · Kbd.
- Command (/atoms/command/) — Composable command menu with search, groups, keyboard navigation, and shortcuts.
- Context Menu (/atoms/context-menu/) — Right-click menu with nested sub-menus and keyboard support.
- Data Table (/atoms/data-table/) — Sortable, filterable table powered by TanStack Table.
- Data Transfer Controls (/molecules/data-transfer-controls/) — Import and export control cluster with optional scope selector and compact menu mode. Composes: Select · Button Group · Dropdown Menu.
- Date Picker (/atoms/date-picker/) — Date input pattern combining a trigger field with a calendar popover.
- Description List (/molecules/description-list/) — Key-value pairs for structured details in profiles and settings panels. Composes: Badge · Button.
- Dialog (/atoms/dialog/) — Modal overlay for focused tasks and confirmations.
- Drawer (/atoms/drawer/) — Bottom sheet that slides up from the edge, optimized for mobile.
- Dropdown Menu (/atoms/dropdown-menu/) — Contextual action menu revealed from a trigger.
- Empty State (/molecules/empty-state/) — Placeholder for empty lists, zero-data views, and no-results scenarios. Composes: Button · Icon.
- Field (/molecules/field/) — Labeled form control composition with hint and error text. Composes: Label · Input · Textarea.
- File Dropzone (/atoms/file-dropzone/) — Accessible drag-and-drop file input with loading and selected-file states.
- Grid List (/molecules/grid-list/) — Responsive grid of cards for simple content, accents, and contact layouts. Composes: Card · Badge · Avatar.
- Help Tooltip (/atoms/help-tooltip/) — Inline help trigger with tooltip content and optional learn-more link.
- Hover Card (/atoms/hover-card/) — Rich preview card that appears on hover over a link or element.
- Input Group (/molecules/input-group/) — Input with leading or trailing text addons, icons, and inset actions. Composes: Input.
- Input Number (/atoms/input-number/) — Numeric input with steppers, unit suffix, and arrow-key stepping.
- Input OTP (/atoms/input-otp/) — One-time password input with individual character slots.
- Input (/atoms/input/) — Single-line text field for user input.
- Kbd (/atoms/kbd/) — Keyboard shortcut display using compact monospaced styling.
- Label (/atoms/label/) — Accessible form label that associates text with its control.
- Media Asset Card (/molecules/media-asset-card/) — Selectable media or file card with grid, list, and responsive orientations. Composes: Card · Icon · Image.
- Media Object (/molecules/media-object/) — Layout primitive pairing fixed media with flexible text content. Composes: Avatar · Icon.
- Menubar (/atoms/menubar/) — Horizontal application menu bar with nested dropdown panels.
- Native Select (/atoms/native-select/) — Styled native HTML select with no JavaScript dropdown overhead.
- Navigation Menu (/atoms/navigation-menu/) — Top-level navigation with accessible animated dropdown panels.
- Notification (/molecules/notification/) — Toast-style notification panel with success, error, warning, and info variants. Composes: Icon · Button.
- Page Heading (/molecules/page-heading/) — Full page header with breadcrumb navigation, title, metadata, and actions. Composes: Button · Badge · Breadcrumb.
- Pagination (/atoms/pagination/) — Navigation control for multi-page content.
- Popover (/atoms/popover/) — Floating panel anchored to a trigger for richer contextual content.
- Progress (/atoms/progress/) — Visual indicator of completion or loading progress.
- Property Row (/molecules/property-row/) — Horizontal label and control row for designer inspector panels. Composes: Input Number · Color Input · Slider.
- Radio Cards (/molecules/radio-card/) — Card-style single selection where each option highlights when selected. Composes: Radio Group · Card.
- Radio Group (/atoms/radio-group/) — Single selection from a set of mutually exclusive options.
- Resizable (/atoms/resizable/) — Drag-to-resize panel groups for flexible layouts.
- Rich Text Editor (/atoms/rich-text-editor/) — Toolbar-driven content editor for formatted HTML input.
- Scroll Area (/atoms/scroll-area/) — Scrollable container with styled custom scrollbar.
- Searchable Table (/atoms/searchable-table/) — Responsive table with search, filters, sorting, mobile cards, and pagination.
- Section Heading (/molecules/section-heading/) — Section header with optional description and action buttons. Composes: Button.
- Select (/atoms/select/) — Dropdown list for choosing a single option.
- Separator (/atoms/separator/) — Visual divider between sections, horizontal or vertical.
- Sheet (/atoms/sheet/) — Slide-in panel anchored to a screen edge.
- Sidebar (/atoms/sidebar/) — Composable side navigation with collapsible, icon, and off-canvas modes.
- Skeleton (/atoms/skeleton/) — Loading placeholder that mimics the shape of pending content.
- Slider (/atoms/slider/) — Range input for selecting numeric values.
- Toast (/atoms/sonner/) — Non-blocking notifications that appear briefly and dismiss automatically.
- Spinner (/atoms/spinner/) — Animated loading indicator for async operations.
- Stacked List (/molecules/stacked-list/) — Vertically stacked rows with consistent padding and optional hover behavior. Composes: Badge · Avatar.
- Stat Card (/molecules/stat-card/) — Metric display card with label, value, optional trend, and optional icon. Composes: Card · Badge · Icon.
- Status Badge (/atoms/status-badge/) — Semantic badge that maps status values to labels, variants, icons, and dots.
- Steps (/atoms/steps/) — Multi-step progress indicator with circles, bullets, and progress variants.
- Switch (/atoms/switch/) — Toggle between two states, on and off.
- Table (/atoms/table/) — Structured data display with rows and columns.
- Tabs (/atoms/tabs/) — Organizes content into switchable panels.
- Textarea (/atoms/textarea/) — Multi-line text field for longer user input.
- Titled Card (/molecules/titled-card/) — Responsive card wrapper with title, subtitle, actions, and mobile-flattened layout. Composes: Card · Card Heading.
- Toggle Group (/atoms/toggle-group/) — Set of toggles with single or multiple selection.
- Toggle (/atoms/toggle/) — Two-state press button for toolbars and filter controls.
- Tooltip (/atoms/tooltip/) — Brief label that appears on hover or focus to clarify an element.
- URL Redirect Prompt (/molecules/url-redirect-prompt/) — Redirect recommendation callout shown when an editable URL handle changes. Composes: Callout · Switch.

## Structured Data

- `catalog.json` indexes the full docs route map
- `registry.json` exposes machine-readable marketing block source metadata
- `llms.txt` is generated from the same component registry used by the catalog
